Bus Subway Runner

There is no end to this chase… Bus Subway Runner is an enjoyable runner game where you are being chased by a policeman. You remember Subway Surfer, right? There you were racing against trains. In Bus Subway Runner, you will be facing buses!

Play Bus Subway Runner Online

Loading game...
About Bus Subway Runner

There is no end to this chase… Bus Subway Runner is an enjoyable runner game where you are being chased by a policeman. You remember Subway Surfer, right? There you were racing against trains. In Bus Subway Runner, you will be facing buses! This browser game page adds original guidance and context so players can understand the challenge before the embedded game loads.

How to Play
  • Press play to load Bus Subway Runner in your browser.
  • Use the controls shown inside the game.
  • Keep practicing to improve your score and progress.
Game Features
Instant browser play Arcade game category Free online gameplay No download required
Frequently Asked Questions

Can I play Bus Subway Runner for free?

Yes. Bus Subway Runner is available as a free browser game on ArcadeNest.

Do I need to install Bus Subway Runner?

No installation is required. The game runs inside the browser iframe.
